name: OpenAI Model Spec
description: OpenAI's Model Spec — defines how OpenAI models should behave across different situations. Specifies objectives, rules, and default behaviors at multiple levels (platform, developer, user). First published 2024-05-08.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety / model-behavior governance document. Sets the policy layer above the model.
